O

OFX - Class in nonprofitbookkeeping.model.ofx
Represents the root element of an OFX (Open Financial Exchange) document.
OFX - Enum constant in enum class nonprofitbookkeeping.service.FileExportService.StatementFormat
Standard OFX 2.x XML.
OFX - Static variable in interface nonprofitbookkeeping.model.ofx.OfxTags

Ofx20Writer - Class in nonprofitbookkeeping.model.ofx
Ofx20Writer generates an OFX 2.0 compliant XML file for a list of banking transactions.

OfxV2JaxbWriter - Class in nonprofitbookkeeping.model.ofx
Generates OFX 2.0 XML using JAXB-based model classes.
OfxV2JaxbWriter() - Constructor for class nonprofitbookkeeping.model.ofx.OfxV2JaxbWriter
 
OfxV2Writer - Class in nonprofitbookkeeping.model.ofx
Provides utility methods to write OFX (Open Financial Exchange) version 2.0 compliant XML files.
OfxV2Writer() - Constructor for class nonprofitbookkeeping.model.ofx.OfxV2Writer
 
OfxV2Writer.BankAccountInfo - Class in nonprofitbookkeeping.model.ofx
Inner class to hold data for bank account information used in OFX sections.
OfxV2Writer.CreditCardInfo - Class in nonprofitbookkeeping.model.ofx
Inner class to hold data for credit card account information used in OFX sections.
OfxV2Writer.InvestmentData - Class in nonprofitbookkeeping.model.ofx
Inner class to hold data for investment account information used in OFX sections.
OfxV2Writer.InvestmentPosition - Class in nonprofitbookkeeping.model.ofx
Describes a single investment holding, such as a stock or mutual fund position.
OfxV2Writer.InvestmentTransactionData - Class in nonprofitbookkeeping.model.ofx
Describes a single investment transaction entry within the statement.
OfxV2Writer.SecurityData - Class in nonprofitbookkeeping.model.ofx
Identifies a security referenced by investment transactions and positions.
OfxV2Writer.SignonData - Class in nonprofitbookkeeping.model.ofx
Inner class to hold data for the OFX sign-on section.
OfxV2Writer.TransactionData - Class in nonprofitbookkeeping.model.ofx
Inner class to hold data for a single transaction, used by the OFX writer methods.
